{{Quote|I'm glad to hear he is okay. Thank you for getting me out of here. I owe Jabba some payback for this. I'm going to free the other farmers. Can you help me?|Raala Ponchar|<ref name="NDA">''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]''</ref>}}
'''Raala Ponchar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Raala was a [[moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]] working in [[Bellek]]'s [[moisture farm/Legends|moisture farm]], between the [[Jundland_Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]] and [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]]. She often bought [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|vaporator]] equipment from [[Watto/Legends|Watto]].

In the days following the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], Ponchar sent multiple messages to the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] regarding several attacks on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] citizens by a [[C-B3 cortosis battle droid/Legends|new type of battle droid]], but the Council lost contact with her soon after. Ponchar was hunted down by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Saato]] who led a [[battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] army against the farms. She was later [[Prisoner/Legends|imprisoned]] in [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]].

[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] was dispatched by the Council to Tatooine to find her, but was captured by Saato and placed in Ponchar's cell. Skywalker was able to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to open the cell door, however, and the two escaped together. Ponchar found his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] which had been taken from him after his imprisonment. She told the Padawan that [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]] of the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] had hired Jabba to transport construction material to [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]], and a metal called [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] for them. Cortosis was resistant to lightsabers, and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] were using it in their new battle droids.

After informing Skywalker that there were other prisoners in the dungeons, the two split up, releasing as many prisoners from the dungeons as they could. Skywalker later reported the information provided to him by Ponchar to his [[Jedi Master/Legends|master]] and friend, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. It is unknown what became of Ponchar following these events.
